news.headline: JOYY sees steady profit growth, with 2024 revenue hitting US$2.24B. US$309.2M in buybacks, quarterly dividends of approx US$50M.
news.summary: JOYY Inc. reported its unaudited financial results for Q4 and full year 2024, with revenue reaching US$549.4 million in Q4, BIGO generating US$480.0 million. The full-year revenue was US$2.24 billion, BIGO's revenue being US$1.99 billion, a 3.3% YoY increase. The non-GAAP net profit for 2024 was US$298.5 million, up 2.0% YoY with a margin of 13.3%. The operating profit was US$136.1 million, a 4.2% YoY increase with a margin of 6.1%. JOYY announced a quarterly dividend policy of US$50 million per quarter and a share repurchase program of up to US$300 million by Dec 2027. They also changed their Nasdaq ticker symbol to JOYY from YY, effective March 31, 2025. CEO Ms. Ting Li highlighted operational efficiency improvements and revenue diversification, emphasizing commitment to growth and shareholder returns. Livestreaming revenues grew by 55.9% to US$449.8 million YoY.

news.summary: The value of Bitcoin has surged following the Federal Reserve's decision to relax balance sheet reduction, boosting investor confidence amid changes in global liquidity dynamics.

Chinese stocks have lowest premium over Hong Kong peers in 2020.
NVIDIA's Earth-2 AI boosts UAE weather forecasting, with G42, for high-res predictions to tackle extreme conditions.
news.summary: NVIDIA has partnered with G42 to enhance regional weather forecasting in the UAE through the Earth-2 platform. This collaboration aims to provide high-resolution predictions, enabling better preparedness for extreme weather conditions. The platform offers advanced solutions to tackle challenges related to weather forecasting in the region. This collaboration is set to significantly improve the accuracy and effectiveness of weather predictions in the UAE.

news.headline: Bitfarms to reveal Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on March 27, 2025. Conference call with management to follow.
news.summary: Bitfarms Ltd. is scheduled to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on March 27, 2025. Following the release, the company's management will conduct a conference call to discuss the results.

news.headline: Innovative data analytics boosted by LangGraph-powered Conversational AI at Inconvo allows easy data access for all.
news.summary: Discover how Inconvo is transforming data analytics with the use of LangGraph to facilitate natural language queries, allowing individuals without technical expertise to access valuable data insights. This innovation marks a significant advancement in democratizing data analytics, with LangGraph enhancing user accessibility.

news.headline: Cryptos surge after Ripple victory over SEC and Powell's dovish signals. Bitcoin at $86,130.95 (+3.53%), Ethereum at $2,032.82 (+4.49%), Dogecoin at $0.1763 (+4.38%). Total $355M liquidated.
news.summary: The leading cryptocurrencies experienced a significant uptrend on Wednesday following positive developments, with Ripple Labs winning the SEC lawsuit and dovish remarks from Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell. Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) saw a gain of 3.53% to reach $86,130.95, hitting a 10-day high of $87,443.27 before a slight retraction. Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) surged by 4.49% to $2,032.82, reclaiming the $2,000 mark after ten days. Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) also rose by 4.38% to $0.1763. Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse's statement regarding the SEC case propelled XRP, the contested coin, up by nearly 10%. The market witnessed liquidation of $355 million in the last 24 hours, with short positions making up $258 million of this amount. The positive news led to a bullish trend in the cryptocurrency sector.

news.headline: Sun Valley Investments AG successfully allocates offer to purchase shares of Mineros S.A. (TSX: MSA, CB: MINEROS)
news.summary: In Toronto, Sun Valley Investments AG has successfully allocated its enhanced public offer to acquire common shares of Mineros S.A. The Company, listed as MSA on the Toronto Stock Exchange and MINEROS on the Colombian Stock Exchange, saw an improved response to the offer announced by Sun Valley.

news.headline: Akebia Therapeutics priced a public offering of 25M shares at $2 each, expecting gross proceeds of $50M. Underwriters have a 30-day option for 3.75M more shares.
news.summary: CAMBRIDGE, MA, 19th March 2025 - Akebia Therapeutics®, Inc. (“Akebia”) (Nasdaq: AKBA), a biopharmaceutical firm dedicated to improving the lives of those affected by kidney disease, revealed the pricing for its underwritten public offering of 25,000,000 shares of common stock at a price of $2.00 per share. The total gross proceeds to Akebia from the Offering, excluding underwriting discounts and commissions, are slated to reach $50.0 million. Moreover, Akebia has provided underwriters with a 30-day option to buy up to 3,750,000 additional shares of common stock at the same offering price. The Offering is set to finalize on March 21, 2025, pending standard closing conditions.

news.headline: FMCS criticizes Luke Rosiak's misleading online article, dating back 12 years, for spreading false claims.
news.summary: On March 19, 2025, in Washington, the Federal Mediation and Conciliation Service (FMCS) released a statement in response to a recent article by Luke Rosiak that revisited information from more than 12 years ago. The article was criticized for its inaccuracies and misleading information. The FMCS aimed to correct the record and clarify the situation.

news.headline: ABOTA backs Chief Justice Roberts' statement against judicial impeachment calls after judges rule against administration.
news.summary: In Dallas on March 19, 2025, the American Board of Trial Advocates supports a noteworthy declaration from US Supreme Court Chief Justice John Roberts criticizing demands for the impeachment of judges who have opposed the directives of the present administration. This message comes amidst a growing debate over the judiciary's independence, reflecting a significant development in the legal sector.

news.summary: In Helsinki, Finland recently urged for global collaboration in the business sector to address critical world issues collectively.

news.headline: Lone Wolf simplifies real estate management with new 'Relationships' platform. Leader in real estate software.
news.summary: Lone Wolf Technologies, a prominent name in residential real estate software, has introduced a new platform called 'Relationships' aimed at streamlining agent communications. This launch was announced on March 19, 2025. Lone Wolf Technologies holds the distinction of being the longest-standing technology company in the real estate sector.

Optinose cancels Q4 and full year 2024 earnings call, scheduled for March 20, 2025 at 8 am Eastern Time.
news.summary: YARDLEY, Pennsylvania, March 19, 2025 - Optinose, a pharmaceutical firm catering to patients under the care of ear, nose, and throat (ENT) and allergy specialists, has revealed the cancellation of its earnings conference call for the quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024. Initially set for March 20, 2025, at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time, the call will no longer take place. Optinose is listed on the NASDAQ exchange under the ticker symbol OPTN.

Chinese labs are tied to Mexican cartels through crypto transactions; $5.5 million seized.
news.summary: Chinese laboratories have been connected to Mexican drug distributors through on-chain evidence. Authorities have seized approximately $5.5 million in cryptocurrency in relation to this investigation.

Lianlian DigiTech sees a 64.7% rise in digital payment TPV for 2024, with adjusted operating profit surging.
news.summary: On March 18, 2025, Lianlian DigiTech, a prominent digital payment and fintech firm based in Hangzhou, China, disclosed its financial performance for 2024. The company's total payment volume (TPV) for digital payments reached a noteworthy figure as of December 31, 2024.

news.headline: VOOPOO introduces ARGUS G3 pod, features iCOSM CODE 2.0. Aimed to offer smoother vaping experience.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, VOOPOO unveiled the ARGUS G3 pod, a highly anticipated device that promises a top-notch vaping experience. Powered by the innovative iCOSM CODE 2.0 technology, the device aims to set new standards in the vaping industry. The unveiling was a significant milestone for VOOPOO's engineers, who described the event as the realization of a dream. The ARGUS G3 is positioned as a strong contender for the title of the best pod of 2025, showcasing a seamless, flavorful, and bright vaping experience.

news.summary: In recent updates, it has been reported that a total of 500 new cases of the virus have been confirmed in the past 24 hours, bringing the overall number of cases to 10,000 in the country. Furthermore, the number of deaths related to the virus has increased by 20, reaching a total of 250 fatalities. Authorities have emphasized the importance of following safety guidelines and practicing social distancing to curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, healthcare facilities are being ramped up to accommodate the rising number of cases. The situation remains critical and individuals are urged to stay informed and take necessary precautions.

news.headline: Dessert Holdings recalls Favorite Day™ Gourmet New York Style Cheesecake 6oz/2ct (Lot code 25028A1 000039133) due to undeclared pecans.
news.summary: In Kennesaw, Georgia, on March 19, 2025, Dessert Holdings LLC issued a recall for Target brand Favorite Day™ Gourmet New York Style Cheesecake 6oz/2ct. The affected lot code is 25028A1 000039133 with UPC 0 85239 09690 1. This recall was initiated due to product mislabeling leading to undeclared pecans in the cheesecake. Consumers with pecan allergies are at risk and advised not to consume the product.

news.headline: Pearl partners with Medit for AI-powered dental diagnostics, enhancing Medit Link platform; improves clinical outcomes.
news.summary: Medit Link and Pearl's AI-powered diagnostic solutions will be combined, providing dental clinicians with improved diagnostic support and communication tools. This integration aims to enhance clinical outcomes and patient experiences. The collaboration was announced on March 19, 2025, between companies based in Seoul, South Korea, and Los Angeles. This partnership will leverage advanced technology to benefit dental practitioners and their patients.

news.headline: Medit partners with Imagoworks to streamline the edentulous prosthetic workflow; Medit SmartX with Imagoworks' AOX to enhance restoration services.
news.summary: On March 19, 2025, in Seoul, South Korea, an integration between Medit SmartX and Imagoworks' AOX was announced. This integration aims to enhance the edentulous prosthetic workflow for dental professionals. By combining these technologies, seamless data transfer and precise prosthetic design are ensured. This synergy will result in improved restoration services, ultimately leading to better patient care. It offers a more efficient process for dental professionals to work with, ultimately improving their services and patient outcomes.

news.headline: Netflix to stream anime "The Summer Hikaru Died" globally. New key visual & character visuals revealed by CyberAgent, Inc.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Tokyo, CyberAgent, Inc. revealed a fresh key visual and character visuals for the TV anime adaptation of the renowned author Mokumokuren's "The Summer Hikaru Died." The show is based on the award-winning novel published by KADOKAWA and produced by CygamesPictures. This announcement marks a significant step in the promotion of the series, featuring captivating artwork to entice viewers.
